title: A Rooftop Clash Against Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 30–33, this part focuses on Unknown person #29, Unknown person #30, Unknown person #31, Unknown person #32 as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: No art can do it. Justice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: There's plenty more where that came from!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Last night's dishes turned out perfectly, if I do say so myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Best of all, Nami seemed to love them. :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a great experience to have right before we dive into the grand line.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 14 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
